description: Golden retrieval cases for the Project Knowledge search. Seed a project with the referenced documents, then run `npm run rag:eval -- <projectId>`. `expectSubstrings` is an OR-set: at least one retrieved passage (content or filename) must contain one of them. Set expectNoAnswer for questions the corpus cannot answer — the system should abstain, not hallucinate.

cases.question: What is the concrete compressive strength requirement for slabs on grade?
What size reinforcing is called for at the footings?
Find every RFI about electrical conflicts.
What is shown on sheet A503?
What is the warranty period for the elevator hydraulic pump seals?
